steps.title: Write the circle equation
steps.content:
A circle with center $(-3,5)$ and radius $8$ has equation
$$
(x+3)^2+(y-5)^2=8^2
$$
$$
(x+3)^2+(y-5)^2=64
$$

steps.title: Expand the standard form
steps.content:
Expand the squared binomials and combine constants.
$$
x^2+6x+9+y^2-10y+25=64
$$
$$
x^2+y^2+6x-10y+34=64
$$

steps.title: Match the general form
steps.content: Move all terms to the left side to match the requested form. $$ x^2+y^2+6x-10y+34-64=0 $$ $$ x^2+y^2+6x-10y-30=0 $$ The answer is -30.
